question: What predictive model do they build?
text:
They build a classifier using linguistic feature sets to predict dogmatism in comments. [2]

The model’s target is whether a comment/post is dogmatic (dogmatism in comments). [3]

citations.title: Identifying Dogmatism in Social Media: Signals and Models
citations.text: A predictive model further validates our feature sets, and also allows us to analyze dogmatism in millions of other Reddit comments in a scalable way, with multiple uses in ongoing, downstream analyses.

citations.title: Identifying Dogmatism in Social Media: Signals and Models
citations.text: We now show how we can use the linguistic feature sets we have described to build a classifier that predicts dogmatism in comments. A predictive model further validates our feature sets, and also allows us to analyze dogmatism in millions of other Reddit comments in a scalable way, with multiple uses in ongoing, downstream analyses.

citations.title: Identifying Dogmatism in Social Media: Signals and Models
citations.text: First, we validate psychological theories by examining the predictive power of feature sets that guide the model's predictions. For example, do linguistic signals of certainty help to predict a post is dogmatic, as theory would suggest?

citations.title: Identifying Dogmatism in Social Media: Signals and Models
citations.text: A predictive model further validates our feature sets, and also allows us to analyze dogmatism in millions of other Reddit comments in a scalable way, with multiple uses in ongoing, downstream analyses.

citations.title: Identifying Dogmatism in Social Media: Signals and Models
citations.section: What user behaviors are predictive of dogmatism? (R3)
citations.text: We have shown dogmatism is captured by many linguistic features, but can we discover other high-level user behaviors that are similarly predictive?

citations.title: Identifying Dogmatism in Social Media: Signals and Models
citations.text: We have constructed the first corpus of social media posts annotated with dogmatism scores, allowing us to explore linguistic features of dogmatism and build a predictive model that analyzes new content. We apply this model to Reddit, where we discover behavioral predictors of dogmatism and topical patterns in the comments of dogmatic users.
